narrative.description: Double Fine's cult classic sends Raz through psychic summer camp and surreal mind-worlds with unique mechanics per mental landscape and emotionally themed level design.
narrative.core_loop: Earn psychic badges at camp, enter agents' minds with unique rules per level, collect figments and mental cobwebs, and stop Coach Oleander's plot.

mechanics.map_notes: Each mind level introduces unique rules—time, gravity, theater, milkman conspiracy.
mechanics.expression: Each mind level introduces unique rules—time, gravity, theater, milkman conspiracy.

mechanics.map_notes: Whispering Rock camp hub gates mind portals via rank progression.
mechanics.expression: Whispering Rock camp hub gates mind portals via rank progression.

mechanics.map_notes: Clairvoyance and PSI powers let Raz read minds and manipulate NPC perception.
mechanics.expression: Clairvoyance and PSI powers let Raz read minds and manipulate NPC perception.

mechanics.map_notes: Figments, cobwebs, and mental baggage gate rank advancement.
mechanics.expression: Figments, cobwebs, and mental baggage gate rank advancement.

mechanics.map_notes: Psychic badges purchased with arrowheads unlock new powers.
mechanics.expression: Psychic badges purchased with arrowheads unlock new powers.

mechanics.map_notes: Emotional baggage, vaults, and nightmares extend each mind 100%.
mechanics.expression: Emotional baggage, vaults, and nightmares extend each mind 100%.

mechanics.map_notes: Meat circus and watery minds alter hazard rules per level.
mechanics.expression: Meat circus and watery minds alter hazard rules per level.

mechanics.map_notes: Nevada and Oleander confrontations gate camp story milestones.
mechanics.expression: Nevada and Oleander confrontations gate camp story milestones.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Boyd's God follow level-specific counter-strategies.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Boyd's God follow level-specific counter-strategies.

mechanics.map_notes: Final brain tank fight spans multiple psychic arena phases.
mechanics.expression: Final brain tank fight spans multiple psychic arena phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Mind portals save progress; death respawns at level entrance.
mechanics.expression: Mind portals save progress; death respawns at level entrance.

mechanics.map_notes: Censors and enemies telegraph before PSI counter windows.
mechanics.expression: Censors and enemies telegraph before PSI counter windows.

mechanics.map_notes: Levitation and mental connection enable extended aerial routes.
mechanics.expression: Levitation and mental connection enable extended aerial routes.

mechanics.map_notes: PSI punch and pyrokinesis clear mental enemies.
mechanics.expression: PSI punch and pyrokinesis clear mental enemies.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Psychonauts through its core platformer loop.
